title: zanthoxylum clava-herculis var. fruticosum
intro: Zanthoxylum clava-herculis var. fruticosum, also known as the Hercules' club, is a variety of the Hercules' club plant, a type of shrub or small tree native to Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating a range of health issues. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and has been traditionally used to treat conditions such as fever, headaches, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
